intro: Erlangea linearifolia is a plant species, commonly known as the "Snake Flower", belonging to the family Asteraceae. The health benefits of Erlangea linearifolia include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Erlangea linearifolia include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess biological activities such as antioxidant and anti-cancer properties.
